name: MSI MAG PANO 120R PZ Mid-Tower Computer Case - Panoramic Tempered Glass Panel - 5x 120mm PWM ARGB Fans - Vertical GPU Bracket - PCIe 4.0 Riser Cable - LED Button - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - USB 3.2 Gen 1 - Audio-out - Mic-in (PANO120RPZ)
shortName: MSI MAG PANO 120R PZ Mid-Tower Computer Case - Panoramic Tempered
description: A mid-tower case with panoramic tempered glass and vertical GPU mounting, featuring multiple ARGB fans and PCIe 4.0 support.
